hypothesis: An online active-learning loop that retrains the ML surrogate on-the-fly using energies, forces, and stresses during SSNEB will enable ML-SSNEB to predict metastable pathways in highly anisotropic and defect-rich solid-state systems with DFT-level accuracy (barrier errors <0.05 eV) while achieving at least a 2× reduction in total SSNEB iterations across CsPbI3, TiO2, and additional polymorphs.
